title: September 11 attacks
summary: Large-scale terrorist attacks in the United States triggered a global risk-off shock.
source_notes: Historical event date is widely documented.

title: Iraq War begins
summary: US-led invasion of Iraq began, increasing geopolitical uncertainty.

title: Lehman Brothers bankruptcy
summary: Lehman Brothers filed for bankruptcy, escalating the global financial crisis.

title: Federal Reserve announces first large-scale asset purchases
summary: The Fed announced large-scale purchases of agency debt and MBS during the crisis.

title: Eurozone debt crisis intensifies
summary: Sovereign debt stress and global equity volatility intensified during August 2011.

title: S&P downgrades US sovereign credit rating
summary: S&P downgraded the United States sovereign rating from AAA amid debt-ceiling stress.

title: FOMC taper-tantrum shock
summary: Fed communication around reducing asset purchases contributed to higher yields and dollar pressure on gold.

title: Russia annexes Crimea
summary: Russia annexed Crimea following a disputed referendum, increasing geopolitical risk.

title: Federal Reserve raises rates for first time since financial crisis
summary: The Fed began policy normalization after the zero-rate period.

title: Brexit referendum result
summary: The UK voted to leave the European Union, causing a sharp risk-off move.

title: Fed hikes amid late-2018 market stress
summary: The Fed raised rates while markets were under stress, highlighting tension between policy and risk assets.

title: Fed emergency rate cut during COVID shock
summary: The Fed delivered an emergency rate cut as COVID-related market stress accelerated.

title: COVID global market crash and liquidity shock
summary: Global markets experienced severe stress and forced liquidation during the COVID shock.

title: Russia invades Ukraine
summary: Russia launched a full-scale invasion of Ukraine, causing a major geopolitical shock.

title: Fed begins 2022 hiking cycle
summary: The Fed began a rapid tightening cycle to fight inflation.

title: Fed delivers 75 bp rate hike
summary: The Fed delivered its largest rate hike in decades as inflation pressures persisted.

title: Silicon Valley Bank collapse
summary: Silicon Valley Bank failed, triggering stress across US regional banks.

title: Hamas attacks Israel; Israel-Hamas war begins
summary: A major attack on Israel triggered war and renewed Middle East risk.

title: Iran launches direct attack on Israel
summary: Iran launched drones and missiles toward Israel, raising escalation risk.
